description.en: This property is a 43 SqM condo with 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom that is available for rent. It is part of the The ESSE Sukhumvit 36 project in Phra Khanong, Bangkok and was completed in Nov 2020. You can rent this condo for ฿50,000 per month and it is also available for sale for ฿16,500,000.
